% STRUCTURE RULES (do not change):

% ============================================================
\documentclass[a4paper,11pt]{article}

\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage{lmodern}
\usepackage[top=1.5cm, bottom=1.5cm, left=2cm, right=2cm]{geometry}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{hyperref}

\pagestyle{empty}

\titleformat{\section}{\large\bfseries\uppercase}{}{0em}{}[\titlerule]
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{12pt}{6pt}

\setlist[itemize]{nosep, left=0pt .. 1.5em, label=\textbullet}

\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}

\end{center}

% ===== PROFILE — replace text only =====
\section{Profile}

Software Engineer with over four years of experience developing and modernizing complex web applications. Strong focus on Angular, TypeScript and Node.js, clean architectures and production-ready solutions. Accustomed to taking ownership and delivering features from concept to rollout.

% ===== TECHNICAL SKILLS — replace content only =====
\section{Technical Skills}

\textbf{Frontend:} Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), RxJS, Angular Material, HTML5, CSS3, SCSS, Tailwind CSS \\
\textbf{Backend:} Node.js, Express, REST APIs \\
\textbf{Databases:} PostgreSQL, MongoDB \\
\textbf{Tooling \& Methods:} Git, GitHub, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), Docker, Agile, Figma \\
\textbf{Languages:} French (Native), German (C1), English (C1)
